member.name: T:Npgsql.MeterProviderBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension method for setting up Npgsql OpenTelemetry metrics.

member.name: M:Npgsql.MeterProviderBuilderExtensions.AddNpgsqlInstrumentation(OpenTelemetry.Metrics.MeterProviderBuilder,System.Action{Npgsql.NpgsqlMetricsOptions})
member.summary: Subscribes to the Npgsql metrics reporter to enable OpenTelemetry metrics.

member.name: T:Npgsql.TracerProviderBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension method for setting up Npgsql OpenTelemetry tracing.

member.name: M:Npgsql.TracerProviderBuilderExtensions.AddNpgsql(OpenTelemetry.Trace.TracerProviderBuilder)
member.summary: Subscribes to the Npgsql activity source to enable OpenTelemetry tracing.
